# SBA Borrowers in Bankruptcy -- Complete Guide [2026]
> Guide for SBA borrowers considering bankruptcy. PPP, EIDL, 7(a) loans, personal guarantees, and discharge. 2026 guide.

## About
sbaborrowersbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- SBA Borrowers in Bankruptcy -- Complete Guide: https://sbaborrowersbankruptcy.com/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
